# Please __DO NOT__ attach logs files here! 
Follow the steps to submit logs confidently!

## Describe the issue
A clear and concise description of what the issue is.

## Tablo2Plex Server (please complete the following information):
 - Version: [e.g. 12.0.1]
 - Server OS: [e.g. Windows, Linux]
 - Server Runtime: [e.g. Windows app, Node process, Docker container]
 - Tablo Device: [e.g. Tablo 4th Gen 2 Tuners]

## Plex Devices (please complete the following information):
 - Plex Server OS: [e.g. Windows, Linux]
 - Plex Streaming App: [e.g. iOS app, Android app, Windows Firefox]

## How to submit logs
 - Change `LOG_LEVEL` to `debug`
 - Change `SAVE_LOG` to `true`
 - Reproduce the issue.
 - Find the log file and __rename it to your github user name with date__.
 - Submit it [here](https://www.dropbox.com/request/GY8756zjZ65WaY36Z7FK) and include the name of the file for reference in your issue thread.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## To Reproduce
Include any steps to reproduce the behavior.

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
